notes: claude_code agent identifiers and catalog names do not reference the local directory.
The source map contains embedded source content and src-extracted is a local research derivative.
An npm package at the same version is an acquisition lead, not proof that the complete derived tree is byte-reproducible.

sensitivity_and_distribution.credential_file_evidence: No .env, credential database, private-key container, session artifact, or user config was identified by the filename and structure audit.
sensitivity_and_distribution.caveat: Auth-, token-, key-, and secret-related source filenames are implementation source, not evidence of live credentials.
sensitivity_and_distribution.reason: The local tree includes packaged and source-map-derived implementation material governed by its bundled legal terms.

destination.purpose: durable local research reference, not an evictable cache

rc051_preconditions: resolve the destination without writing it into tracked files as a machine-specific absolute path
require the exact destination to be absent before copying
compute a deterministic full-tree digest and entry count before the move
copy the complete tree with file bytes and relative layout preserved
verify the destination digest and entry count before removing the source path
abort and retain the source on any copy or verification mismatch
do not upload, publish, archive to external storage, or commit raw tree contents
record only sanitized version, count, digest, source-absence, and destination-boundary evidence

recovery.restore_method: copy the verified external tree back to ignored path claude_code if local research requires it
recovery.source_lock_policy: The selected metadata is an identity aid; it does not claim reproducibility of the derived tree.

rationale: The repository has no tracked path dependency on the directory.
Keeping 133 MB of ignored external implementation material in the worktree obscures the repository boundary.
The source-map-extracted research derivative may not be byte-reproducible from the package version alone.
A verified local move preserves research value without publishing or deleting the only known copy.
